minor_notes: In the section 'What a webhook actually is', the text says 'We'll set up the connection using the integration, then show the raw webhook so you understand what's happening underneath.' This could be interpreted as a promise to demonstrate two different methods, but the guide only shows the (correct and recommended) integration method. The explanation of the mechanism is good, but the phrasing might lead a user to expect a second, alternative setup guide for a 'raw' webhook that doesn't follow.
